Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.

programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: Miss Brodie gives a dramatic speech, meets her students, offends the conservative Miss Gaunt, and draws the attention of handsome and married art teacher Teddy Lloyd.
Sexual harassment raises its ugly head in the newsroom - but for once its not Henry's. Meanwhile, Damien is busy invading every bit of privacy he can to track down a Nazi war criminal.

programmes.show_name: The Man Who Made Husbands Jealous
programmes.show_description: The steamy classic from Rivals author Jilly Cooper. Broke and infamous, Lysander Hawkley turns tabloid notoriety into seducing wronged wives.
Men in a small town die after intense sexual encounters. Agent Agar investigates and uncovers that Dr. Susan Harris's secret bee research may be creating lethal seductresses unleashed in shadows.
